name: Houdini Action: Import Camera
description: Creates a Houdini action that imports a camera from an Alembic or FBX file into /obj. Chain via actions_in/actions_out into a Houdini Headless node.
python_code:
async def execute(self, inputs):
    actions_in = inputs.get('actions_in') or []
    if not isinstance(actions_in, list):
        actions_in = [actions_in]
    camera_path = inputs.get('camera_path') or self.get_parameter('camera_path', '')
    action = {'type': 'import_camera', 'camera_path': camera_path}
    actions_out = list(actions_in) + [action]
    self.log_info(f'Added import_camera action -> {camera_path}')
    await self.set_output('actions_out', actions_out)
    await self.set_output('exec_out', True)
    return {'actions_out': actions_out}
